<!-- Copilot instructions for Tax Suvidha Kendra Next.js + Tailwind project -->

## Project Overview
Next.js project with TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, and App Router configured. Uses npm as the package manager.

## Development Workflow
- Run `npm run dev` to start the development server
- Run `npm run build` to create a production build
- Run `npm run lint` to check code quality
- Edit files in `src/app` for App Router pages and components

## Key Technologies
- Next.js (with App Router)
- TypeScript
- Tailwind CSS
- ESLint
